programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Arizona Cardinals quarterback Kyler Murray puts the team on his back to upset the San Francisco 49ers on the road.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Chicago rallies 16 points in the fourth quarter as the 'Cardiac Bears' attempt to take down the reigning NFC North champion Lions in the regular season finale of the 2025 season.

programme.title: NFL Events
programme.desc: Former NFL linebacker and Super Bowl champion Scott Fujita traces his family history in the U.S. back to Japanese internment during World War II.

programme.sub-title: Jordan Mailata's Journey From Australian Rugby League to Eagles Draft Pick
programme.desc: Meet Jordan Mailata, the 6-foot-8, 345-pound former rugby league player from Sydney, Australia. Jordan has left a successful career in Australia to try and achieve the impossible - making an NFL roster, with no knowledge or previous experience.
